The Relationship Mirror

A Reflective Quiz

Every relationship is a mirror — showing us, gently, what lives within us. This isn't a test you can fail. It's a reflective pause, designed to help you see yourself with more clarity, more compassion, and more choice.

Takes about 4–5 minutes · Your answers are private to this session
